name: Table

semanticTypeCandidates.evidence: Dense data table for dashboard metrics, user lists, and operational records
Simplified table with status tags and row actions for management screens

representativeVariants.name: Default Data Table
representativeVariants.whySelected: Core table pattern — flat surface, hairline borders, 40px row height, header with muted background
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Header row (background var(--color-surface-container-low), font-weight 500, font-size caption, text-transform uppercase): 用户名 / 角色 / 状态 / 注册时间. Data rows: 李明/管理员/活跃/2024-01-15, 王芳/编辑/活跃/2024-03-22, 赵磊/访客/草稿/2024-06-10. Status cells use tag component.

representativeVariants.name: Table with Status Tags
representativeVariants.whySelected: Table integrating tag component for status column — most common dashboard table pattern
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Header: 项目名称 / 访问量 / 状态 / 更新时间. Rows: 数据分析面板/12,847/已完成/2分钟前, 用户管理模块/3,421/活跃/1小时前, 报告导出功能/856/草稿/3天前. Numeric values in JetBrains Mono.

representativeVariants.name: Table with Row Actions
representativeVariants.whySelected: Table with action column — edit/delete ghost buttons per row, common in management screens
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Header: 用户名 / 角色 / 状态 / 操作. Rows: 李明/管理员/活跃/[编辑][删除], 王芳/编辑/活跃/[编辑][删除], 赵磊/访客/草稿/[编辑][删除]. Action buttons are ghost-style text links with orange text.

anatomy.description: Table header row, background var(--color-surface-container-low), font-weight 500, font-size caption, uppercase, padding var(--space-2) var(--space-4)
Data row, 40px height, padding var(--space-2) var(--space-4), border-bottom 1px solid var(--color-border)
Table cell, font-size body, vertical-align middle. Numeric cells use JetBrains Mono font-family.
Last column action cell with ghost text buttons (编辑, 删除), gap var(--space-2)

structurePatterns: Table: width 100%, border-collapse collapse, background var(--color-surface)
Header: background var(--color-surface-container-low), border-bottom 1px solid var(--color-border), text-align left

Header cell: padding var(--space-2) var(--space-4), font-size var(--font-size-caption), font-weight 500, color var(--color-muted-foreground), text-transform uppercase, letter-spacing .04em, white-space nowrap
Body cell: padding var(--space-2) var(--space-4), font-size var(--font-size-body), color var(--color-foreground), border-bottom 1px solid var(--color-border)
Numeric cell: font-family var(--font-mono), font-size var(--font-size-body)
Action buttons: ghost-style text links, color var(--color-primary), font-size var(--font-size-caption), gap var(--space-2)

bestPractices: Use for dense data display in dashboard panels — stats, user lists, records
Status column should integrate tag component (primary=active, success=completed, default=draft)
Numeric values always in JetBrains Mono for precision feel
Row hover uses subtle surface-container-low tint, never orange
Action column last — ghost text buttons, danger actions in error color
Default row height 40px aligns with input/button height for visual rhythm
Empty state: single row with centered muted text '暂无数据'

doNotInvent: Sortable column headers with arrows (not in spec — render static headers)
Pagination controls inside table (separate component below table)
Fixed/sticky columns or headers (not in spec)
Zebra striping (brand uses hover tint only, not alternating rows)
unknowns: Column widths are flexible — determined by content, no fixed column widths in spec
Selection checkboxes not in spec — render without selection column unless explicitly required
keyInsightSeed: Flat data table with hairline borders, 40px rows, mono numerics, hover tint via surface-container-low
